Test: Autonomy increases with tier
Test: Memory availability increases with tier

Test: Pro tier uses advanced Gemini model         Expected: Better reasoning fo

Test memory system works with tiering

Test: Pro tier can access full conversation history

Scenario: Free tier user has 10-turn conversation         Expected: Only last 5
Scenario: Pro tier user has 50-turn conversation         Expected: All 50 turns

Test: Tier names case-insensitive

test_memory_and_authorization_rationale_.label: Test suite for TORA tool authorization and memory management Tests tier-aware t
Test memory store factory and selection
Free tier should use FreeTierStore
Pro tier should use ProTierStore
Enterprise tier should use EnterpriseTierStore
Invalid tier should default to FreeTierStore
Test Free tier 5-turn conversation window
Free tier window should be exactly 5 turns
get_tier_memory_limit should return 5 for free
FreeTierStore should load history with 5-turn limit
Should handle empty history gracefully
Should return empty list on exception
Test Pro tier unlimited conversation history
Pro tier should have no practical limit (MAX_LIMIT = 1000)
ProTierStore has safety max of 1000
ProTierStore should load with MAX_LIMIT for safety
Test Enterprise tier unlimited history with metadata
Enterprise has higher limit for extensibility
Enterprise tier store should request metadata
Test conversation history formatting for LLM prompting
Should return default message for empty history
Should format single message correctly
Should format multi-turn conversation correctly
Should show timestamp when available
Test memory usage statistics
Free tier stats should show 5-turn limit
Pro tier stats should show unlimited
Enterprise tier stats should show unlimited
Test authorization patterns for tool execution
Free tier should require confirmation for autonomous tools
Pro tier should not require confirmation for plan creation
High-risk actions (tax updates) require confirmation even for Pro
Integration tests for memory system with tiering
Free tier should enforce 5-turn window in production flow
Pro tier should get all available history
Test error handling in memory operations
Should gracefully handle DB connection failures
Should handle malformed history data
